name: Stripe
short_description: The world's most used payments API. Accept cards, bank transfers, and 135+ currencies with a single integration.
description: Stripe is a comprehensive payments platform used by millions of businesses worldwide. It provides APIs for accepting payments, managing subscriptions, handling payouts, detecting fraud, and issuing cards. Stripe handles PCI compliance, currency conversion, and supports 135+ currencies across 195+ countries. Built-in support for Apple Pay, Google Pay, and buy-now-pay-later options.

pricing_details.notes: 2.9% + 30¢ per successful card transaction. No monthly fees.

name: Twilio SMS
short_description: Send and receive SMS, MMS, and WhatsApp messages programmatically via REST API.
description: Twilio's Programmable Messaging API enables sending and receiving SMS, MMS, and WhatsApp messages at scale. Supports long codes, short codes, toll-free numbers, and alphanumeric sender IDs. Global coverage across 180+ countries with delivery receipts, message scheduling, and opt-out management built in. Used by Airbnb, Uber, and millions of other applications.

pricing_details.notes: From $0.0079 per SMS sent/received (US). Volume discounts available.

name: SendGrid
short_description: Reliable transactional and marketing email delivery API trusted by 80,000+ companies.
description: SendGrid by Twilio is the leading email delivery service, sending over 100 billion emails per month for companies like Uber, Airbnb, and Spotify. Provides a REST API and SMTP relay for transactional email, along with a marketing campaigns platform. Features include email templates, click/open tracking, unsubscribe management, IP warming, and deliverability analytics.

name: Anthropic Claude API
short_description: Access Claude — Anthropic's AI assistant — for text generation, analysis, coding, and reasoning tasks.
description: The Anthropic API provides access to Claude, a state-of-the-art large language model built for safety and helpfulness. Claude excels at nuanced instruction following, long-context document analysis (up to 200K tokens), code generation and review, summarization, and complex reasoning. Available models include Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Claude 3 Opus, and Claude Haiku for different speed/cost tradeoffs.

pricing_details.notes: Claude 3.5 Sonnet: $3/M input tokens, $15/M output tokens

name: OpenAI API
short_description: Access GPT-4o, DALL-E, Whisper, and embeddings through one unified AI API.
description: OpenAI provides APIs for accessing its frontier AI models including GPT-4o for text and vision, DALL-E 3 for image generation, Whisper for audio transcription, and text-embedding-3 for vector embeddings. Supports function calling, JSON mode, streaming responses, and fine-tuning. The most widely integrated AI API with extensive library support across all major languages.

pricing_details.notes: GPT-4o: $2.50/M input tokens. GPT-4o mini: $0.15/M input tokens.

name: Cohere
short_description: Enterprise NLP API for text generation, embeddings, reranking, and RAG pipelines.
description: Cohere provides production-ready NLP APIs purpose-built for enterprise use cases. Command R+ leads in RAG and tool use performance. The Embed API generates multilingual embeddings optimized for semantic search. The Rerank API improves retrieval quality by reordering search results by relevance. Offers private deployment options for regulated industries.

name: Groq
short_description: Ultra-fast LLM inference API — run Llama, Mixtral, and Gemma at hundreds of tokens per second.
description: Groq provides the fastest LLM inference available through its custom Language Processing Units (LPUs). Supports open-source models including Llama 3.1 405B, Mixtral 8x7B, and Gemma 2 with typical throughput of 500-800 tokens/second. Drop-in compatible with the OpenAI API format. Ideal for latency-sensitive agent workflows where speed is critical.

name: Mistral AI
short_description: European frontier AI models API — Mistral Large, Codestral, and Mixtral for text and code.
description: Mistral AI offers a family of frontier language models accessible via API, including Mistral Large 2 for complex reasoning, Codestral for code generation in 80+ languages, and Mistral Embeddings for semantic search. GDPR compliant with EU data residency. Supports function calling, JSON mode, and streaming. Particularly strong on European language tasks.

pricing_details.notes: Mistral Large 2: $2/M input tokens. Codestral: $0.2/M tokens.

name: Replicate
short_description: Run thousands of open-source AI models via API — image, video, audio, and language models.
description: Replicate provides a simple API to run open-source machine learning models in the cloud. Hosts thousands of models including Stable Diffusion XL, FLUX, Whisper, LLaMA, and more. Pay only for compute time used. Supports streaming predictions, webhooks, and model fine-tuning. No infrastructure management required — just call the API.

pricing_details.notes: Pay per second of compute. Varies by model and hardware.

name: Algolia Search
short_description: Hosted search API delivering sub-10ms full-text and AI-powered search at any scale.
description: Algolia is the leading hosted search API, powering search for Stripe, Twitch, Lacoste, and thousands more. Delivers sub-10ms search results with typo tolerance, geo-search, filters, faceting, and personalization. NeuralSearch combines keyword and vector search for best-in-class relevance. REST and SDK-based API with real-time indexing.

name: Cloudinary
short_description: Media management API for image and video upload, transformation, optimization, and CDN delivery.
description: Cloudinary is the leading cloud platform for managing images and videos. Upload, transform, optimize, and deliver media via a simple URL-based API or SDKs. Features include on-the-fly image resizing, format conversion, background removal, AI-powered tagging, video transcoding, and global CDN delivery. Used by over 1 million developers worldwide.

name: Mailgun
short_description: Transactional email API built for developers — reliable delivery with advanced analytics.
description: Mailgun is a developer-first email API service used by over 150,000 companies. Provides SMTP and REST API for sending, receiving, and tracking transactional emails. Features include email validation, inbound routing, template engine, delivery analytics, and email parsing. Known for high deliverability rates and detailed logging for debugging.

name: Postmark
short_description: Transactional email API laser-focused on speed and deliverability. Average delivery in under 10 seconds.
description: Postmark specializes exclusively in transactional email — no marketing email — which means dedicated IP infrastructure and industry-leading deliverability. Average delivery time under 10 seconds. Features include email templates, bounce management, inbound email processing, detailed open and click tracking, and a 45-day message history. Trusted by GitHub, Basecamp, and Heroku.

name: Resend
short_description: Modern email API for developers — built with React Email support and a clean REST interface.
description: Resend is the modern email sending API designed for developer experience. Features first-class React Email integration for building email templates with JSX, a clean REST API, real-time webhooks, and a beautiful dashboard. Supports custom domains, multi-region sending, and team collaboration. Built by former Vercel engineers with modern tooling in mind.

name: Plaid
short_description: Connect to 12,000+ financial institutions to access bank data, verify accounts, and process payments.
description: Plaid is the leading financial data network, enabling applications to securely connect to users' bank accounts. Provides APIs for bank account verification, transaction history, income verification, identity verification, balance checks, and ACH payment initiation. Powers apps like Venmo, Robinhood, and Coinbase. Covers 12,000+ financial institutions in the US, Canada, and Europe.

pricing_details.notes: Contact for pricing. Per-item connection fees apply.

name: Auth0
short_description: Drop-in authentication and authorization platform — social login, MFA, and enterprise SSO in minutes.
description: Auth0 by Okta provides a flexible authentication and authorization platform used by 18,000+ organizations. Supports 30+ social login providers, passwordless authentication, MFA, enterprise SSO (SAML, OIDC), and anomaly detection. Management API for user management, role-based access control, and custom rules/actions. SDKs for every major language and framework.

name: Clerk
short_description: Complete user management and authentication for modern web apps — components, hooks, and APIs.
description: Clerk provides complete user management infrastructure with pre-built UI components, hooks, and a full backend API. Features include email/password, social OAuth, passkeys, MFA, user profiles, organization management, and session management. Deeply integrated with Next.js, React, and popular frameworks. Handles all auth complexity so developers focus on product.

name: Google Maps Platform
short_description: The world's most comprehensive maps, routing, and places API with global coverage.
description: Google Maps Platform provides mapping, geocoding, routing, and places APIs used by millions of applications. Key APIs include Maps JavaScript API, Geocoding API, Directions API, Places API, Distance Matrix API, and Street View. Covers 250 countries with real-time traffic, public transit data, and 200+ million businesses and points of interest.

name: Mapbox
short_description: Custom maps and location APIs — navigation, geocoding, and 3D mapping for developers.
description: Mapbox is the leading platform for custom maps and location-based services. Offers APIs for geocoding, navigation and routing, isochrones, map matching, and matrix calculations. Mapbox GL JS enables beautiful 3D, interactive maps with full style customization. Used by Strava, Snap, Facebook, and The New York Times for location-powered products.

name: OpenWeatherMap
short_description: Weather data API covering current conditions, forecasts, and historical data for any location on Earth.
description: OpenWeatherMap provides weather data for any point on the globe via a simple REST API. Offers current weather, 5-day forecasts, hourly forecasts, air quality index, UV index, and 40+ years of historical data. Covers 200,000+ cities with data updated every 10 minutes. Widely used for its generous free tier and simple integration.

name: Tomorrow.io
short_description: Enterprise weather intelligence API with hyper-local forecasts, nowcasting, and weather insights.
description: Tomorrow.io (formerly ClimaCell) provides the most accurate weather API for enterprise use cases. Offers hyper-local forecasting down to street level, real-time nowcasting, severe weather alerts, historical data, and climate change projections. Proprietary data from IoT sensors, satellites, radar, and aircraft. Used by Delta Air Lines, Ford, and Uber.

name: GitHub REST API
short_description: Programmatic access to GitHub repositories, issues, pull requests, Actions, and user data.
description: The GitHub REST API provides full programmatic access to GitHub — the world's largest code hosting platform. Create and manage repositories, read and write issues and pull requests, trigger and monitor GitHub Actions workflows, manage organizations and teams, access user profiles, and search across all of GitHub. Rate limit of 5,000 requests/hour for authenticated users.

pricing_details.notes: GitHub Apps can get higher rate limits

name: Cloudflare R2
short_description: S3-compatible object storage with zero egress fees — store and serve files globally at minimal cost.
description: Cloudflare R2 is an S3-compatible object storage service with zero egress fees. Store unlimited data and serve it globally through Cloudflare's network without paying for bandwidth out. Supports the full S3 API for easy migration. Ideal for storing large files, backups, media assets, and log archives. Sub-millisecond access from Workers for compute-adjacent storage.

name: AWS S3
short_description: Industry-standard object storage — durable, scalable, and the foundation of the modern cloud.
description: Amazon S3 is the world's most widely used object storage service. Store and retrieve any amount of data with 99.999999999% durability. Supports versioning, lifecycle policies, replication, event notifications, and static website hosting. Foundational to countless architectures — from backup and archive to data lakes and application assets. Integrates with every major cloud service.

name: Vonage SMS
short_description: Global SMS, voice, and messaging API platform with coverage across 200+ countries.
description: Vonage (formerly Nexmo) provides a comprehensive communications API platform. The SMS API offers high-throughput messaging across 200+ countries with delivery receipts. Also offers voice calls, verify (2FA), video, WhatsApp Business, and number provisioning. Long-established platform with enterprise-grade reliability and compliance certifications.

name: Sentry
short_description: Application monitoring API — capture errors, performance issues, and crashes in real time.
description: Sentry is the leading application monitoring and error tracking platform. The Sentry API provides programmatic access to issues, events, projects, and releases. Automatically captures exceptions, performance bottlenecks, and crashes across web, mobile, and server applications. Integrates with GitHub, Jira, Slack, and PagerDuty. Supports 100+ programming languages and frameworks.

name: Airtable API
short_description: Read and write data to Airtable bases — a flexible no-code database with a powerful REST API.
description: The Airtable API enables programmatic access to Airtable — a spreadsheet-database hybrid used by over 500,000 organizations. Create, read, update, and delete records across any base and table. Supports filtering, sorting, pagination, and field type handling for all Airtable field types. Useful for agents that need to read structured data from non-technical team workflows.

name: NewsAPI
short_description: Search and retrieve live news articles from 150,000+ sources worldwide via simple REST API.
description: NewsAPI aggregates news from 150,000+ sources and blogs worldwide, providing a simple REST API to search headlines, full articles, and source metadata. Supports filtering by keyword, source, language, country, and date range. Covers breaking news in real time and historical articles going back 5 years. Used for news monitoring, sentiment analysis, and research workflows.

name: Hunter.io
short_description: Find and verify professional email addresses from domain names and company names.
description: Hunter.io helps find professional email addresses associated with any domain or company. The Domain Search endpoint returns all email addresses found for a given domain. The Email Finder endpoint finds the email of a specific person by name and company. The Email Verifier checks deliverability and validity. Widely used in sales prospecting, outreach, and data enrichment pipelines.

name: Clearbit
short_description: B2B data enrichment API — enrich companies and contacts with 100+ firmographic and demographic attributes.
description: Clearbit (now part of HubSpot) provides real-time data enrichment APIs for B2B companies. The Enrichment API appends 100+ data points to companies and people from email or domain: industry, employee count, funding, technologies used, social profiles, and more. The Prospector API finds contacts at target companies. The Reveal API identifies anonymous website visitors.

pricing_details.notes: Contact for pricing. Typically $99-$999+/month based on volume.

name: Square Payments
short_description: Payment processing API for in-person, online, and mobile payments with built-in fraud protection.
description: Square's Payments API enables businesses to accept payments in person, online, and via mobile. Offers REST APIs for payment processing, refunds, disputes, and payment links. Includes built-in fraud detection, PCI compliance, and next-day deposits. Also provides APIs for inventory, customer management, loyalty programs, and reporting. Popular with small and medium businesses.

name: Hugging Face Inference API
short_description: Run 100,000+ open-source AI models via API — NLP, vision, audio, and multimodal tasks.
description: Hugging Face's Inference API provides access to over 100,000 open-source machine learning models for NLP, computer vision, audio processing, and multimodal tasks. Run text classification, named entity recognition, question answering, image segmentation, and more via a simple POST request. Serverless inference is available for most public models with no setup required.

pricing_details.free_tier: Serverless inference free with rate limits

name: Stability AI
short_description: Image, video, and 3D generation API — Stable Diffusion and Stable Video models via REST.
description: Stability AI's REST API provides access to Stable Diffusion image generation, Stable Video Diffusion for video generation, Stable Diffusion 3 for text-to-image, and sketch/structure/style control models. Generate images from text, edit existing images with inpainting, upscale images 4x, and create short video clips. Industry-standard models for creative AI workflows.

name: Typesense
short_description: Open-source, typo-tolerant search API — fast, self-hosted or cloud-hosted alternative to Algolia.
description: Typesense is a fast, typo-tolerant, open-source search engine with a clean REST API. Typesense Cloud provides a hosted version with automatic scaling. Sub-50ms search responses, vector search support for semantic search, geo-search, faceting, and dynamic sorting. Built for developers who want Algolia-quality search without vendor lock-in. Fully compatible with the Algolia API as a drop-in replacement.

pricing_details.free_tier: Self-host free forever. Cloud from $0.000015/search request.

name: Linear API
short_description: Project management API for software teams — access issues, projects, cycles, and roadmaps programmatically.
description: Linear's API provides GraphQL and REST access to the issue tracking and project management tool built for modern software teams. Create, update, and query issues, projects, cycles, roadmaps, teams, and users. Supports webhooks for real-time event streaming. Useful for agents that need to create tasks, check project status, or integrate with engineering workflows.

name: Braintree
short_description: Full-stack payment platform by PayPal — cards, PayPal, Venmo, Apple Pay, and local payment methods.
description: Braintree is a full-stack payments solution owned by PayPal. Accepts credit/debit cards, PayPal, Venmo, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and local payment methods in 45+ currencies. Provides client SDKs for web and mobile, a server-side REST API, and drop-in UI components. Includes built-in fraud protection, subscription billing, and detailed reporting. Used by Uber, Airbnb, and GitHub.

name: Uploadcare
short_description: File uploading, transformation, and CDN delivery API — images, videos, and documents in one platform.
description: Uploadcare is a comprehensive file handling platform with APIs for uploading, storing, and transforming files. Features include direct-from-browser uploads, resumable uploads for large files, image transformations via URL parameters, smart CDN delivery, virus scanning, and document conversion. Supports 50+ file types including images, videos, PDFs, and office documents.

name: Deepgram
short_description: AI speech recognition API — real-time and batch audio transcription with 99%+ accuracy.
description: Deepgram provides AI-powered speech-to-text APIs for real-time streaming and pre-recorded audio transcription. Offers models optimized for different use cases: Nova-2 for general transcription, Whisper for broad language support, and domain-specific models for medical and finance. Features include speaker diarization, punctuation, language detection, and sentiment analysis. Used by Spotify, NASA, and Ring.

name: ElevenLabs
short_description: Hyper-realistic AI voice generation and cloning API — text to speech in 29 languages.
description: ElevenLabs provides state-of-the-art AI voice synthesis APIs. Generate natural-sounding speech in 29 languages with 1,000+ voices or clone a voice from a short audio sample. The Speech Synthesis API converts text to speech with emotion and style control. The Voice Cloning API creates a digital twin of any voice. Used for audiobooks, video dubbing, virtual assistants, and accessibility tools.

name: Firecrawl
short_description: Web scraping and crawling API that converts any website into clean, LLM-ready markdown.
description: Firecrawl is a web scraping API built for AI applications. Crawl any website and get back clean, structured markdown or structured data — no HTML mess. Handles JavaScript-rendered pages, auth-protected content, pagination, and sitemap crawling. Outputs are optimized for LLM context windows. Features include screenshot capture, metadata extraction, and change tracking.

name: Brave Search API
short_description: Independent web search API with no Google or Bing dependency — privacy-first with fresh index.
description: Brave Search API provides access to Brave's independent web search index — not a wrapper around Google or Bing. Returns web results, news, videos, images, and AI-generated answers. Privacy-respecting with no user tracking. Supports localization for 90+ countries, SafeSearch, freshness filtering, and structured result formats. Increasingly used in AI agent workflows needing live web search.

name: Serper
short_description: Real-time Google Search API — get web, news, images, and maps results via simple REST calls.
description: Serper provides a fast, affordable Google Search API. Query Google web search, news, images, videos, shopping, and maps results programmatically with sub-second response times. Returns structured JSON results. Popular in AI agent stacks for providing agents with live web search capabilities. 10x cheaper than most Google Search API alternatives.

name: Tavily
short_description: AI-optimized search API purpose-built for LLM agents — returns summarized, citation-backed answers.
description: Tavily is a search API specifically designed for AI agents and RAG pipelines. Unlike traditional search APIs that return raw URLs and snippets, Tavily returns filtered, summarized, and citation-backed results optimized for LLM consumption. Features include depth control (basic vs. advanced search), domain filtering, topic-specific search, and a Q&A mode that returns direct answers.

name: Pinecone
short_description: Managed vector database API — store, index, and query high-dimensional embeddings at scale.
description: Pinecone is the leading managed vector database for building AI applications. Store billions of vector embeddings and query them with sub-millisecond latency. Supports metadata filtering, namespace partitioning, and hybrid search combining dense and sparse vectors. Fully managed with no infrastructure to run. Used in RAG pipelines, recommendation systems, and semantic search applications.

name: Supabase
short_description: Open-source Firebase alternative — Postgres database, auth, storage, edge functions, and realtime via API.
description: Supabase is an open-source backend-as-a-service built on PostgreSQL. Provides a full REST and GraphQL API auto-generated from your database schema, real-time subscriptions via WebSockets, authentication with social providers, file storage, edge functions, and vector search with pgvector. Supports direct Postgres access alongside the API layer.

name: Neon
short_description: Serverless Postgres with branching — instant database provisioning and scale-to-zero for modern apps.
description: Neon is serverless Postgres designed for modern cloud-native applications. Key features include instant provisioning, scale-to-zero compute (pay only when active), database branching for development and testing workflows, and point-in-time restore. Compatible with all Postgres tooling and extensions including pgvector. Optimized for platforms like Vercel and Railway.

pricing_details.free_tier: 0.5GB storage, compute hours free tier included

name: Upstash
short_description: Serverless Redis and Kafka API — per-request pricing with global low-latency data access.
description: Upstash provides serverless Redis and Kafka with per-request pricing and no idle costs. Redis API is fully compatible with Redis protocol — use for caching, sessions, rate limiting, and pub/sub. Kafka API for event streaming with REST API access. Global replication ensures low latency worldwide. HTTP REST API means no persistent connections needed.

name: Abstract API
short_description: Suite of 20+ utility APIs — email validation, phone lookup, IP geolocation, holidays, and more.
description: Abstract provides a collection of simple, well-documented utility APIs covering common business logic needs. Includes email validation, phone number validation and carrier lookup, IP geolocation, timezone detection, currency exchange rates, VAT validation, company data enrichment, holiday data, and IBAN validation. Single API key for all endpoints with consistent response formats.

name: Lob
short_description: Print and mail API — send personalized postcards, letters, and checks programmatically.
description: Lob's API enables programmatic direct mail — send postcards, letters, self-mailers, and checks to any US address. Integrates with CRM and marketing automation workflows for triggered physical mail campaigns. Features include address verification, mail tracking, template management, and campaign analytics. Handles all printing, addressing, and USPS delivery logistics.

pricing_details.notes: Postcards from $0.80 each. Letters from $0.87 each.

name: Exa AI Search
short_description: Neural web search API designed for AI — find pages by meaning, not just keywords.
description: Exa (formerly Metaphor) is a web search API built on neural retrieval, finding pages based on meaning rather than keyword matching. Returns full page contents alongside URLs, ideal for RAG pipelines and agent research tasks. Supports semantic search, similarity search (find pages similar to a given URL), and live crawling to extract current page content. Purpose-built for AI applications.
